title: Two Blondes and a Redhead
writer: Victor McLeod, Jameson Brewer, Harry Sauber
actors: Jean Porter, Jimmy Lloyd, June Preisser
plot: Socialite Cathy Abbott (Jean Porter) is working in the chorus of a Broadway show instead of being enrolled at an exclusive girls' school as her parents think. When the show closes, she brings two of her chorus friends, Patti Calho...
